articles.headline: Ecuador shock Germany, seal spot in World Cup knockout stage
articles.description: Gonzalo Plata poked the ball past Manuel Neuer in the 77th minute, and Ecuador advanced to the knockout stage of the World Cup by rallying for a 2-1 win over Germany on Thursday.
